item.title: Tung Tung Sahur is now at the center of a federal “custody battle” over brainrot characters The creators of Steal a Brainrot are asking a court to rule that Mementum Lab can’t claim copyright control over the viral meme #tungtungtungsahur #tungtungsahur #
